scripts:
set properties on /content/dam/aem-webmcp/jcr:content
  set cq:conf{String} to /conf/aem-webmcp
  set jcr:title{String} to "AEM WebMCP"
end
create service user webmcp-service with path system/aem-webmcp

set ACL for webmcp-service
  allow jcr:all on /var/aem-webmcp
  allow jcr:read on /content/aem-webmcp
end
